images.title: Basement wall water ingress observed at construction joint
images.caption: Damp staining and active seepage visible along a horizontal joint on a basement retaining wall, with minor pooling at the floor-wall junction.

images.title: Concrete column honeycombing detected after form removal
images.caption: Rough, voided concrete surface with exposed aggregate and localized cavities at the lower portion of a reinforced concrete column.

images.title: Rebar congestion visible at beam-column joint
images.caption: Dense reinforcement cluster at a beam-column joint with closely spaced bars, tight tie wire, and limited visible concrete flow path.

images.title: MEP duct coordination clash at ceiling void
images.caption: A large rectangular duct intersects the planned ceiling service zone, with nearby pipework and cable tray creating a tight coordination conflict.

images.title: Unsafe open edge adjacent to scaffold access point
images.caption: Unprotected slab edge with no visible guardrail at the landing area next to scaffold access, exposing a fall hazard.

images.title: Hairline crack observed near lift core wall opening
images.caption: Thin vertical crack line visible near the lift core wall corner, with no obvious displacement or spalling at the surface.

images.title: Water ingress approaching temporary electrical riser
images.caption: Moisture staining and seepage are visible on the floor near a temporary electrical riser, with damp routing nearby.

images.title: Falling object exclusion zone breached beneath overhead work
images.caption: Workers are present inside a taped-off area beneath elevated work, with materials and tools staged above.

images.title: Concrete spalling at slab edge after formwork striking
images.caption: Chunks of concrete missing from the slab edge with rough fractured surfaces following formwork removal.

images.title: Temporary works prop shows visible deformation
images.caption: A support prop beneath a temporary load-bearing arrangement is visibly bowed, with uneven bearing at the head and base plates.

images.title: Confined-space gas detector alarm triggered during drainage inspection
images.caption: A worker is positioned near a manhole opening with a handheld gas detector displaying an alarm state.

images.title: Mobile crane lift conducted near overhead service line
images.caption: A mobile crane boom is extended near an overhead utility line, with the lifting area active below.
